label: Gen step outpost
description: Generates an outpost structure on the map. Extends GenStep directly - does not use scatterer placement.

size.label: Size
size.description: Width and height in cells of the outpost footprint.

requiredWorshippedTerminalRooms.label: Required worshipped terminal rooms
requiredWorshippedTerminalRooms.description: Minimum number of worshipped-terminal rooms the outpost must contain.

requiredGravcoreRooms.label: Required gravcore rooms
requiredGravcoreRooms.description: Minimum number of gravcore-compatible rooms the outpost must contain.

allowGeneratingThronerooms.label: Allow generating thronerooms
allowGeneratingThronerooms.description: Whether thronerooms may be generated inside the outpost.

settlementDontGeneratePawns.label: Settlement don't generate pawns
settlementDontGeneratePawns.description: When true, no enemy pawns are generated inside the outpost.

allowGeneratingFarms.label: Allow generating farms
allowGeneratingFarms.description: Whether farm growing zones may be generated inside the outpost.

generateLoot.label: Generate loot
generateLoot.description: Whether loot is placed inside the outpost at generation time.

postProcessSettlementParams.label: Post-process settlement params
postProcessSettlementParams.description: Optional parameters for post-generation processing of outpost buildings.

unfogged.label: Unfogged
unfogged.description: When true, the outpost area is revealed on the map without requiring scouting.

attackWhenPlayerBecameEnemy.label: Attack when player became enemy
attackWhenPlayerBecameEnemy.description: When true, outpost pawns attack the player if the faction becomes hostile.

defaultPawnGroupPointsRange.label: Default pawn group points range
defaultPawnGroupPointsRange.description: Threat points range used to generate outpost pawns when no site-part points are available.

pawnGroupKindDef.label: Pawn group kind def
pawnGroupKindDef.description: PawnGroupKindDef controlling the type of pawns generated inside the outpost.
